sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88663" key="prosapiste/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσᾰπιστέω</orth>, <sense id="n88663.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be distrustful besides</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4000.tlg001:2:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristaenet.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
